More than a résumé

More than a résumé.

Click below to begin the deep‑dive. It’s a quick, interactive market study on recruiter pain, the hiring noise, and the one signal that earns real trust. Yes, this research is genuinely about you.
✵

I'm a fourth-year student at IIIT Nagpur, hooked on product since I realised the hard part isn't building - it's figuring out what's worth building.

I like sitting with messy, half-formed problems until they click into a clear decision, and I learn fastest by shipping the thing and seeing what people actually do with it.

Stage 01 · The Problem

The Hiring Signal Crisis

Thousands of resumes. Every one claims the same six things. The words blend into noise.

Stage 03 · Persona

The recruiter

Kiran Mehta
Product Recruiter
0

0

Roles open
Primary goal
Find exceptional product talent, efficiently.
Primary frustration
Everyone appears similar on paper.
Primary need
Clear evidence. Fast confidence. Low hiring risk.
Calendar load
Unread applications
Decision confidence

The problem wasn’t a lack of candidates.

The problem was a lack of differentiation.

Great candidates looked exactly like average candidates.

Differentiation became the product opportunity.
